columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: The department number associated with the order

columns.name: INTERN_BELASTNING
columns.description: Indicates internal loading status or type

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: The current status of the order

columns.name: BELAST_SELGER
columns.description: The salesperson responsible for loading or managing the order

columns.name: BELOP
columns.description: The amount related to the order, possibly a financial value

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when an action or event occurred

columns.name: BRUKER
columns.description: The user who performed the action related to the order

columns.name: KLARGJ_DATO
columns.description: The scheduled date for delivery or completion of the order
